list.name: Stocks on Solana
list.note: Contacts are added on magic-link sign-in via /api/auth/request

typography.font_stack: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace

sendgrid.asm_group_note: Create an unsubscribe group in SendGrid (Marketing > Unsubscribe Groups) and attach it to single sends / campaigns.
how_to_send: Marketing > Single Sends > Create Single Send
Paste HTML from emails/issues/*.html into the Design editor (Code mode)
Subject: use the subject line at the top of each issue file
Preview text: use preheader comment in the HTML

notes: Match terminal aesthetic: black bg, amber #FF9900, mono type.
Keep body copy tight. Numbers first, narrative second.
Not financial advice disclaimer in every market issue.
